deviations.description: The process model prohibits blood collection if the donor has either recently undergone surgery OR received a blood transfusion, but Version 2 only prohibits collection when BOTH conditions are true. The process model is stricter than the new requirement, resulting in non-compliance with the updated, less restrictive rule.

The process model continues to enforce the prohibition on blood collection for donors who have only one of the two conditions (recent surgery OR blood transfusion), which is no longer required under Version 2. This results in unnecessary restriction of donor eligibility.
